title: Sour Crispy Banana Stir-fry
description: A sour and crunchy Filipino dish featuring dark brown soft sugar to aid in hangover recovery, prepared with a Jain-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Bananas
ingredients.notes: Choose ripe bananas for best flavor.

ingredients.name: Dark brown sugar
ingredients.notes: Use raw or unrefined dark brown sugar to maintain authenticity and health benefits.

instructions: Peel and finely chop the bananas.
In a bowl, mix the chopped bananas with dark brown sugar, water, salt, and soy sauce if using. Stir until well combined.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Pour the banana mixture into the skillet and stir-fry for about 5 minutes, or until the bananas are golden and crispy on the outside.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
